GAME_FINISHED_THANKS:
Thank you for playing Cut the Rope: DX.
Make sure you visit Cut the Rope Home website for more Cut the Rope fun.
GAME_FINISHED_TEXT2: Check back for the new levels coming with the updates

RATEME_TEXT: If so, please rate this game on the App Store with 5 stars so we can keep the free updates coming.
ABOUT_FANWORK_MAIN:

A Cut the Rope Home fan project.

AC_TUMMY_TEASER_DESCR: Have Om Nom open his mouth 10 times in a row
AC_MAGICIAN_DESCR: Drop candy into magic hats 200 times
AC_BOX_PERFECT_DESCR: Get three stars in all levels of %s
QUIT: Are you sure you want to quit?
OUTDATED_WINDOWS_TEXT:
This Windows version is not officially supported. Bugs and crashes may occur.
Please do not open a GitHub issue or ask for help for problems caused by this configuration.

TUTORIAL_TEXTS.TUTORIAL_LVL_1_1_01: Slide across or click to cut the rope
TUTORIAL_TEXTS.TUTORIAL_LVL_1_2_01: Collect as many stars as you can
TUTORIAL_TEXTS.TUTORIAL_LVL_1_5_02: The bubble will lift the candy up
TUTORIAL_TEXTS.TUTORIAL_LVL_1_6_01: Don't let the candy leave the box
TUTORIAL_TEXTS.TUTORIAL_LVL_1_8_01: You can restart the level by pressing the
TUTORIAL_TEXTS.TUTORIAL_LVL_1_10_01: Automatic ropes appear when candy gets into their area
TUTORIAL_TEXTS.TUTORIAL_LVL_1_14_01: You can skip the level in the pause menu
TUTORIAL_TEXTS.TUTORIAL_LVL_1_16_01: Keep the candy away from spikes
TUTORIAL_TEXTS.TUTORIAL_LVL_1_20_01: You can cut several ropes at once
TUTORIAL_TEXTS.TUTORIAL_LVL_2_1_01: Click the air cushion to blow object
TUTORIAL_TEXTS.TUTORIAL_LVL_2_9_01: Cut the rope before the spider reaches the candy
TUTORIAL_TEXTS.TUTORIAL_LVL_2_17_01: Some stars require fast actions to be collected
TUTORIAL_TEXTS.TUTORIAL_LVL_3_1_01: Some rope hooks can be moved with the cursor
TUTORIAL_TEXTS.TUTORIAL_LVL_4_1_01: Drop the candy into the magic hat and it will fall out from the other one
TUTORIAL_TEXTS.TUTORIAL_LVL_4_3_01: Candy maintains its speed when teleporting
TUTORIAL_TEXTS.TUTORIAL_LVL_5_1_01: Combine two pieces of candy before feeding it to Om Nom
TUTORIAL_TEXTS.TUTORIAL_LVL_6_1_01: Candy will bounce away from this platform
TUTORIAL_TEXTS.TUTORIAL_LVL_7_1_01: Rotate the wheel to control the rope length
TUTORIAL_TEXTS.TUTORIAL_LVL_8_1_01: Toggle the gravity with this button
TUTORIAL_TEXTS.TUTORIAL_LVL_9_1_01: Turn the blades with this button
TUTORIAL_TEXTS.TUTORIAL_LVL_10_1_01: The bee carries candy along this path
TUTORIAL_TEXTS.TUTORIAL_LVL_11_1_01: Rotate the record using this handle
TUTORIAL_TEXTS.TUTORIAL_LVL_11_6_01: Move the rope holder from one record to another
TUTORIAL_TEXTS.TUTORIAL_LVL_12_1_01: Ghost has several forms. Tap to switch them.
TUTORIAL_TEXTS.TUTORIAL_LVL_13_1_01: Tap the valve to switch between 3 pressure modes
TUTORIAL_TEXTS.TUTORIAL_LVL_14_1_01: Put candy into a lantern and it pops into all the others
TUTORIAL_TEXTS.TUTORIAL_LVL_14_1_02: Tap any lantern to get the candy to drop down
TUTORIAL_TEXTS.TUTORIAL_LVL_15_1_01: Mouse is catching candy and moving it to different holes
TUTORIAL_TEXTS.TUTORIAL_LVL_15_1_02: Tap the mouse to drop the candy
TUTORIAL_TEXTS.TUTORIAL_LVL_16_1_01: Illuminate Om Nom to wake him up
TUTORIAL_TEXTS.TUTORIAL_LVL_17_1_01: Drag the belt to move objects with it
TUTORIAL_TEXTS.TUTORIAL_LVL_17_8_01: You can shift objects from one belt to another
